meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no design skills (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no design skills. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Design Solutions for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Learn to overcome design limitations using Claude Code and Antigravity. A professional, intermediate-level checklist for freelancers to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Eliminate design bottlenecks by leveraging Claude Code’s agentic capabilities to translate high-fidelity UI requirements into production-ready code. By integrating Antigravity for rapid scaffolding, you bypass manual styling and focus on core logic, allowing you to deliver polished, professional SaaS interfaces at record speed without needing a design background.
content.intro:
The blank canvas is a freelancer’s greatest enemy. You have the backend logic, the database schema, and the business requirements, but when it comes to the UI, your progress grinds to a halt. The gap between functional code and a client-ready interface is where profit margins die—and where your reputation is tested.

Stop wrestling with CSS frameworks and pixel-perfect positioning. By mastering Claude Code as your lead front-end engineer and utilizing Antigravity as your infrastructure scaffold, you transform your workflow. You move from a developer struggling with design to a product architect delivering high-value, scalable interfaces in a fraction of the time.

steps.title: Architecting the Design System
steps.description: Establish a consistent visual language before writing a single line of component code to ensure scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this project scope and generate a comprehensive tailwind-based design system including color palette, spacing scale, and typography hierarchy.
steps.claude_code_command: claude -c 'Create a tailwind.config.js file based on the design system guidelines provided.'

steps.title: Scaffolding the UI Layout
steps.description: Use automated scaffolding to establish your app's structural foundation, ensuring responsive layouts from the start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a responsive dashboard layout component using React and Tailwind CSS that includes a sidebar, header, and content area.
steps.claude_code_command: claude -c 'Implement the generated layout components into the current project structure.'

steps.title: Component-Driven Development
steps.description: Decompose the UI into reusable modules to minimize technical debt and maximize development speed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Break down this user flow into modular, reusable UI components with clear props interfaces.
steps.claude_code_command: claude -c 'Create the individual atomic components defined in the architectural plan.'

steps.title: Integrating Dynamic Data
steps.description: Bind your UI components to real data sources, ensuring the design handles loading states and empty data gracefully.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a service layer for these components that handles API fetching, error states, and loading skeletons.
steps.claude_code_command: claude -c 'Connect the components to the API layer and implement error handling logic.'

steps.title: Production-Ready Polish
steps.description: Execute a final automated review to ensure accessibility, performance, and visual consistency across all pages.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for accessibility compliance (WCAG) and performance bottlenecks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude -c 'Refactor components based on audit feedback to improve performance and accessibility scores.'

pro_tips: Always define a strict 'Component Props' contract in your prompt to prevent Claude from generating mismatched state logic.
Use 'dry-run' mode in your CLI to verify component changes before committing to your production branch.
Inject your existing design tokens into the prompt context to ensure brand consistency across every generated UI element.
Prioritize 'Skeleton Screens' over loaders to improve the perceived performance of your application for the end client.
Leverage Claude Code’s history feature to quickly iterate on variations of complex UI components without manual rewrites.
content.next_steps: Once your UI is scaffolded, begin integrating your backend services and deploy your first MVP to a staging environment for client feedback.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting design friction stall your freelancing career. Leverage the power of AI to ship faster, look better, and charge more for your expertise. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
